assertions.assertion: Code calls GetDiscoveryDocumentAsync to resolve endpoints from the authority rather than hardcoding the token endpoint URL
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Concept 3 shows httpClient.GetDiscoveryDocumentAsync('https://identity.example.com') and Pitfall 5 explicitly warns against hardcoding

assertions.assertion: Code checks disco.IsError before using the discovery response to handle unreachable or invalid discovery documents
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Concept 3 shows 'if (disco.IsError) throw new Exception(disco.Error);'

assertions.assertion: Code uses RequestClientCredentialsTokenAsync (or equivalent POST to the token endpoint) with grant_type=client_credentials
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Concept 2 Client Credentials section describes the flow with grant_type=client_credentials

assertions.assertion: Code sets the Scope to 'catalog.read' and provides ClientId and ClientSecret in the token request
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Concept 2 Client Credentials shows client_id, client_secret, scope parameters in the request

assertions.assertion: Code uses disco.TokenEndpoint as the Address for the token request rather than a hardcoded URL
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Concept 3 shows 'var tokenEndpoint = disco.TokenEndpoint;' and Pitfall 5 recommends resolving from discovery
